# DDx GraphQL Schema
# Single source of truth for the SvelteKit UI.
# Every type field is doc-commented. Relay cursor connections on all lists.

# ============================================
# Scalars
# ============================================

"""ISO-8601 datetime string"""
scalar DateTime

"""Arbitrary JSON blob (used for opaque map fields)"""
scalar JSON

# ============================================
# Interfaces
# ============================================

"""Node is the Relay global object identification interface"""
interface Node {
  """Globally unique identifier"""
  id: ID!
}

# ============================================
# Pagination (Relay Cursor Connections)
# ============================================

"""PageInfo carries cursor-based pagination state (Relay spec)"""
type PageInfo {
  """True when more edges exist after the last returned edge"""
  hasNextPage: Boolean!
  """True when more edges exist before the first returned edge"""
  hasPreviousPage: Boolean!
  """Cursor of the first edge in the current page (null when empty)"""
  startCursor: String
  """Cursor of the last edge in the current page (null when empty)"""
  endCursor: String
}

# ============================================
# Node & Project
# ============================================

"""NodeInfo represents the running ddx-server instance"""
type NodeInfo implements Node {
  """Unique node identifier (stable across restarts)"""
  id: ID!
  """Human-readable node name"""
  name: String!
  """Timestamp when the server process started"""
  startedAt: DateTime!
  """Timestamp of the most recent heartbeat"""
  lastSeen: DateTime!
}

"""Project represents a registered ddx project on this node"""
type Project implements Node {
  """Unique project identifier"""
  id: ID!
  """Short display name"""
  name: String!
  """Absolute filesystem path to the project root"""
  path: String!
  """Git remote URL, if configured"""
  gitRemote: String
  """When the project was first registered with the server"""
  registeredAt: DateTime!
  """Timestamp of the last successful probe"""
  lastSeen: DateTime!
  """True when the project path is inaccessible"""
  unreachable: Boolean
  """Set when the project has been tombstoned (soft-deleted)"""
  tombstonedAt: DateTime
}

"""ProjectEdge is one edge in a ProjectConnection"""
type ProjectEdge {
  """The project at this position"""
  node: Project!
  """Opaque cursor for pagination"""
  cursor: String!
}

"""ProjectConnection is a Relay cursor connection of projects"""
type ProjectConnection {
  """Ordered list of project edges"""
  edges: [ProjectEdge!]!
  """Pagination metadata"""
  pageInfo: PageInfo!
  """Total number of projects matching the filter"""
  totalCount: Int!
}

# ============================================
# Beads
# ============================================

"""Bead is a portable work item with lifecycle metadata"""
type Bead implements Node {
  """Unique bead identifier (e.g. "ddx-a1b2c3d4")"""
  id: ID!
  """Short summary of the work"""
  title: String!
  """Lifecycle status: proposed, open, in_progress, blocked, closed, cancelled"""
  status: String!
  """Numeric priority (lower is higher priority)"""
  priority: Int!
  """Issue classification (e.g. "task", "bug", "spike")"""
  issueType: String!
  """Agent or human currently responsible"""
  owner: String
  """When the bead was created"""
  createdAt: DateTime!
  """Who or what created the bead"""
  createdBy: String
  """Last modification timestamp"""
  updatedAt: DateTime!
  """Freeform labels for filtering and grouping"""
  labels: [String!]
  """Project identifier this bead belongs to"""
  projectID: String
  """Parent bead ID for hierarchy"""
  parent: String
  """Full description / body text"""
  description: String
  """Acceptance criteria text"""
  acceptance: String
  """Freeform notes appended during work"""
  notes: String
  """Dependency edges to other beads"""
  dependencies: [Dependency!]
}

"""Dependency is a directed edge between two beads"""
type Dependency {
  """The bead that has the dependency"""
  issueId: String!
  """The bead that must be completed first"""
  dependsOnId: String!
  """Dependency kind (e.g. "blocks", "relates-to")"""
  type: String!
  """When the dependency was created"""
  createdAt: String
  """Who created the dependency"""
  createdBy: String
  """Opaque metadata attached to the link"""
  metadata: String
}

"""BeadEdge is one edge in a BeadConnection"""
type BeadEdge {
  """The bead at this position"""
  node: Bead!
  """Opaque cursor for pagination"""
  cursor: String!
}

"""BeadConnection is a Relay cursor connection of beads"""
type BeadConnection {
  """Ordered list of bead edges"""
  edges: [BeadEdge!]!
  """Pagination metadata"""
  pageInfo: PageInfo!
  """Total number of beads matching the filter"""
  totalCount: Int!
}

"""BeadStatusCounts holds aggregate bead counts by status"""
type BeadStatusCounts {
  """Number of beads in open status"""
  open: Int!
  """Number of beads in in_progress status"""
  inProgress: Int!
  """Number of beads in closed status"""
  closed: Int!
  """Number of beads in blocked status (external blocker set)"""
  blocked: Int!
  """Number of beads in proposed status (awaiting operator approval)"""
  proposed: Int!
  """Number of beads in cancelled status"""
  cancelled: Int!
  """Number of open beads whose dependencies are all closed"""
  ready: Int!
  """Number of execution-eligible ready beads"""
  workerReady: Int!
  """Number of open/in_progress beads with unmet dependencies"""
  dependencyWaiting: Int!
  """Number of beads with an external blocker reason set"""
  externalBlocked: Int!
  """Number of beads requiring operator attention (proposed)"""
  operatorAttention: Int!
  """Total number of beads"""
  total: Int!
}

# Documents (library)

"""Requeue an existing run by reopening its originating bead so the execute-loop can claim it again. Atomic with respect to the mandatory idempotencyKey: concurrent calls with the same key dedupe to the originating bead and never enqueue twice. An audit event of kind run_requeue is appended to the originating bead capturing operator identity, run id, and the optional layer override."""
  runRequeue(input: RunRequeueInput!): RunRequeueResult!

  """Start a new review session. Persists the session manifest and seeds an empty transcript so subsequent reviewSessionRespond calls can append turns."""
  reviewSessionStart(input: ReviewSessionStartInput!): ReviewSession!

  """Append a user turn to a review session and dispatch a reviewer reply. The session must be in the active status; calls against terminal sessions return REVIEWER_UNAVAILABLE."""
  reviewSessionRespond(
    """Review session identifier"""
    sessionId: ID!,
    """User turn to append to the session before dispatching the reviewer"""
    turn: ReviewTurnInput!
  ): ReviewSession!

  """Cancel an active review session. Transitions the session to the cancelled status; idempotent (cancelling a cancelled session is a no-op and returns true)."""
  reviewSessionCancel(
    """Review session identifier"""
    sessionId: ID!
  ): Boolean!
}

"""ReviewSession is the server-side review state machine persisted under .ddx/reviews/<id>/. Mirrors the manifest plus the append-only turns transcript so the UI can render the full review conversation."""
type ReviewSession {
  """Unique session identifier"""
  id: ID!
  """Artifact under review"""
  artifactId: String!
  """Artifact content SHA at the time the session was started"""
  artifactSha: String!
  """Git rev the artifact was read from (commit/branch/tag), when known"""
  artifactGitRev: String
  """Rubric prompt body used as the reviewer system instruction"""
  systemRubric: String
  """Library template reference used to render the reviewer prompt"""
  templateRef: String
  """Library prompt reference used to render the reviewer prompt"""
  promptRef: String
  """Lifecycle status: active, completed, or cancelled"""
  status: String!
  """Accumulated reviewer cost in USD across all turns"""
  costUSD: Float!
  """Optional cost cap. Zero means no cap."""
  maxBillableUSD: Float!
  """Append-only transcript of user and reviewer turns"""
  turns: [ReviewTurn!]!
}

"""ReviewTurn is one transcript entry in a review session."""
type ReviewTurn {
  """Turn actor: 'user' or 'reviewer'"""
  actor: String!
  """Turn content body"""
  content: String!
  """Reviewer cost in USD for this turn (zero for user turns)"""
  costUSD: Float!
  """When the turn was appended"""
  createdAt: DateTime!
}

"""Input for reviewSessionStart. The session identifier may be omitted; when blank the server allocates one."""
input ReviewSessionStartInput {
  """Optional client-supplied session identifier. When blank the server allocates one."""
  sessionId: String
  """Artifact under review (path or stable id)"""
  artifactId: String!
  """Artifact content SHA at session start; cached and compared against the live artifact when a turn fires."""
  artifactSha: String!
  """Library template reference used to render the reviewer prompt"""
  templateRef: String
  """Library prompt reference used to render the reviewer prompt"""
  promptRef: String
  """Optional cost cap in USD; zero means no cap"""
